infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mesh needs access to your location to provide location-based features, find nearby services, and enhance your experience.

infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Mesh needs photo library access to save and select league images.
